LanguageData.GravNausea.letterText: While landing {GRAVSHIP}, {PILOT_nameDef} was forced into an emergency maneuver, resulting in an intense and prolonged deceleration. The experience has left your colonists badly motion-sick, though the effects will fade quickly.
LanguageData.MinorGravshipCrash.letterText: While landing {GRAVSHIP}, {PILOT_nameDef} disengaged the Hellion reactor too early, causing the aircraft to drop several feet. Some structures aboard the Hellion have sustained light damage from the impact.
LanguageData.OverheatedGravEngine.letterText: While landing {GRAVSHIP}, {PILOT_nameDef} overworked the Hellion reactor, causing it to overheat. The reactor will take longer than normal to cool down. In the meantime, the Hellion cannot be launched.
LanguageData.ThrusterBreakdown.letterText: While landing {GRAVSHIP}, {PILOT_nameDef} overheated the Hellion's VTOL thrusters, frying valuable components. The thrusters will need to be repaired before they can be used again.
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelPipeRupture.letterText: During {GRAVSHIP}'s landing, a damaged fuel line sprayed astrofuel into the compartment. A stray spark set it ablaze in a sudden astrofire.
LanguageData.VGE_CriticalHeatSpike.letterText: While bringing {GRAVSHIP} down, the Hellion reactor's heat-control system malfunctioned, causing structural heat to surge far beyond safe limits.
LanguageData.VGE_GravTurbulence.letterText: An unexpected lift-field vibration during {GRAVSHIP}'s descent shook every component on board, loosening bolts and wearing joints.
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenLeak.letterText: While landing {GRAVSHIP}, a small breach opened in one of the oxygen tanks, venting the tank's entire supply. Until the leak is repaired, the oxygen tank will not work.
LanguageData.VGE_VacBarrierFlicker.letterText: While landing {GRAVSHIP}, a power fluctuation caused one of the vac barriers to fail, depressurizing a small section of the Hellion. It will need to be repaired before it functions again.
